scripts.api-gen: rm -rf src/generated/openapi && openapi-generator-cli generate -i https://api.dev.datafangst.orcalabs.no/api-doc/openapi.json --generator-name typescript-axios -o src/generated/openapi --additional-properties=useSingleRequestParameter=true,withSeparateModelsAndApi=true,apiPackage=api,modelPackage=models
scripts.api-gen:local: rm -rf src/generated/openapi && openapi-generator-cli generate -i http://localhost:8081/api-doc/openapi.json --generator-name typescript-axios -o src/generated/openapi --additional-properties=useSingleRequestParameter=true,withSeparateModelsAndApi=true,apiPackage=api,modelPackage=models
